name: Intrinsic-Noise Consolidation: A Doob-Barrier-Conditioned Diffusion Turns Analog Device Noise into a Continual-Learning Resource (2607.06924)

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: On analog neuromorphic hardware, intrinsic device noise is normally an accuracy tax. We ask whether it can instead consolidate memories. We cast per-synapse consolidation as a Doob h-transform, conditioning each weight's stochastic dynamics on never crossing a memory-critical barrier. The method produces a falsifiable prediction: increasing intrinsic noise non-monotonically improves sequential-task retention, an inverted-U that anchored-drift methods cannot produce. On Split-MNIST the rule lifts
